title: Enchantments+
description: A small mod adding a lot of enchantments to minecraft
body:
A small Mod adding a lot of new enchantments including
- smelting touch (smelts drops)
- ender slayer (increases damage against ender mobs)
- health mending (repair tools instead of healing)
- basalt walker (walk on lava)
- telekinesis (automatically pick up drops)

and so much more!
